# audio

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Audio block type: upload an audio file and play it inline. Audio block type: registers its `data` schema (attachment) at the server write boundary.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Editor.Block` "audio" → `AudioBlock`
  - Uses:
    - `infra/attachments.uploadAttachment`
    - `page/attachment-block.AttachmentUpload`
    - `page/editor.Editor`
    - `page/editor.registerBlockPasteHandler`
    - `primitives/css/center.Center`
    - `primitives/css/pin.Pin`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
    - `primitives/hover-reveal.hoverRevealGroup`
    - `primitives/hover-reveal.hoverRevealTarget`
    - `primitives/text-editor/paste-images.attachmentUrl`
  - Exports (values):
    - `AUDIO_TYPE`
    - `audioBlock`
- Server:
  - Contributes: `page.block-data` "audio"
  - Uses: `page/editor.Editor`
- Core:
  - Uses: `page/editor.defineBlock`
  - Exports (values):
    - `AUDIO_TYPE`
    - `audioBlock`
